<!--
Thanks for contributing! A few conventions (see CONTRIBUTING.md):
- Use a Conventional Commits PR title (feat: / fix: / chore: / docs:).
- CI must pass before merge; direct pushes to main are not allowed.
- Do not include secrets or tokens in the diff or description.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link issues this addresses, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Maintenance / dependencies / CI (`chore:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] CI passes locally / in this PR
- [ ] Tests added or updated where it makes sense
- [ ] Docs updated where it makes sense
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or internal-only references included
